title: Neutral Bay Home Renovation
summary: Custom kitchen, laundry and supporting built-in joinery completed as part of a broader Neutral Bay home renovation.
heroAlt: Finished Neutral Bay kitchen with island, white shaker cabinetry and tall appliance wall
overview: This Neutral Bay renovation shows the joinery moving from installation stage into a cleaner, more resolved finished outcome. The completed work includes a custom kitchen, supporting storage details and laundry cabinetry that help the home feel more integrated and functional.
materials: Lower North Shore home renovation joinery

afterImages.alt: Finished Neutral Bay kitchen with island and tall white cabinetry
afterImages.caption: Finished Neutral Bay kitchen showing the island, tall cabinetry, integrated appliances and completed joinery layout.

afterImages.alt: Finished Neutral Bay kitchen with drawers, splashback and wine fridge
afterImages.caption: Finished kitchen angle showing the benchtop run, drawer storage, splashback detail and integrated wine fridge.

afterImages.alt: Wide finished Neutral Bay kitchen view with island and appliance wall
afterImages.caption: Alternate wide kitchen view showing the island, appliance wall and the overall completed layout.

afterImages.alt: Neutral Bay kitchen corner storage pullout detail
afterImages.caption: Corner storage detail from the finished Neutral Bay kitchen showing the internal hardware and custom joinery access.

afterImages.alt: Finished Neutral Bay laundry with tall storage cabinetry
afterImages.caption: Finished laundry joinery showing the tall storage cabinet, bench run and completed cabinetry finish.

beforeImages.alt: Neutral Bay kitchen during renovation with cabinetry carcasses being installed
beforeImages.caption: Kitchen during renovation with cabinetry carcasses being installed before doors and finishes were added.

beforeImages.alt: Neutral Bay laundry carcasses installed before doors and finishes
beforeImages.caption: Laundry carcasses installed before doors, benchtop and final finishes were added.

beforeImages.alt: Neutral Bay kitchen from a different angle during installation
beforeImages.caption: Another angle of the kitchen during installation showing the island and cabinetry taking shape.

spaces.title: Completed kitchen and joinery
spaces.text: The finished joinery ties the kitchen, storage and supporting cabinetry together so the renovated home feels cleaner, more resolved and easier to use day to day.
spaces.alt: Finished Neutral Bay kitchen with island and custom cabinetry

outcome: The completed Neutral Bay joinery package brought the kitchen, storage and supporting cabinetry into a more resolved finished state across the home.
ctaText: If you are planning a Neutral Bay renovation and need the joinery scope handled cleanly, send through your current plans or site photos.
